title: Mexico, at home, in front of 87,000
body: Estadio Azteca opens the show. The host's group draw will set the volume for the whole tournament.

title: Vancouver, the chillest host city
body: Average June high of 21°C and a stadium ten blocks from the harbor. Bring a light jacket anyway.

title: 104 matches, 39 days
body: First tournament with 48 teams. Roughly 2.7 matches per day, every day, for six weeks.

title: Underdog tracker is open for nominations
body: Tell us who's punching above their seed and we'll keep a column on it through groups.

title: 1994: the last time the US hosted
body: Average attendance 68,991 — still the all-time record. 2026 is built to break it.

title: Mexico City sits 2,240m above sea level
body: Visiting teams arrive a week early. The thin air giveth, the thin air taketh away.
